issues.claim: the Tuesday-trace is descriptive rather than predicate-yielding
issues.objection: The scenario describes a mode of engagement but does not yield a falsifiable engineering predicate strong enough to test in code or a postmortem. Minor — the implication does name an audit ('notice whether you switch modes').

notes: BG 6.31's engineering analog identifies a real distinction observable in seniors — continuity vs mode-switching of substrate-engagement. The named tools (Kafka, Datadog, PagerDuty, Terraform, IAM, Elasticsearch, Postgres) are not decorative. The honest scope-tagging (STRETCHED) prevents the verse from being read as 'tenure produces enlightenment.' PASS.
